products.name: VECTOR-600
products.descriptor: Advanced autopilot with redundant ADAHRS-INS for fixed-wing, rotary-wing, and VTOL UAVs

evidence.snippet:
Qualified Hardware for Cross Domain Missions
VECTOR-600's hardware is qualified against **[MIL-STD-810F](/company/news-and-events/mil-std-810f-461f)** [(vibration, acceleration, humidity, rain, temperature, etc.)](/company/news-and-events/mil-std-810f-461f)[,](/company/news-and-events/mil-std-810f-461f) [**MIL-STD 461F**](/company/news-and-events/mil-std-810f-461f) (EMI) and **ISO 9001:2015** standards.

products.name: VECTOR-400
products.descriptor: Compact MIL-STD autopilot for aerial targets and uncrewed surface vehicles

evidence.snippet: The Professional's Choice for Aerial Targets and Uncrewed Surface Vehicles (USVs)

products.name: GNSS-Denied Navigation Kit
products.descriptor: AHRS + visual navigation system kit for jam/spoof-resistant dead-reckoning navigation

products.name: POLAR-300 - AHRS-IMU
products.descriptor: MEMS-based ADAHRS and INS for UAV avionics integration and dead-reckoning navigation

evidence.snippet: The **POLAR-300** is a high-end, MEMS-based **Air Data and Attitude and Heading Reference System (ADAHRS) and Inertial Navigation System (INS)**. It is perfect for system integration in avionics packages or other attitude sensing applications, and includes:

products.name: Visionair - Ground Control Station (GCS) Software
products.descriptor: GCS software for planning, execution, and post-analysis of UAV missions

evidence.snippet:
Visionair - Ground Control Station (GCS) Software
-------------------------------------------------
Visionair is UAV Navigation's (UAVN) standard **Ground Control Station (GCS) software for UAV missions**. It aids in the planning, execution and post-analysis of UAV operations.

products.name: DGC01 - Dual GNSS Compass
products.descriptor: Dual-antenna GNSS compass for magnetic-independent heading estimation on UAVs

evidence.snippet:
DGC01 - Dual GNSS Compass
-------------------------
**DGC01 (Dual GNSS Compass)** allows you to accurately estimate the actual heading, under both static and dynamic conditions with no reliance placed on magnetic sensors.

products.name: GHU-100 - Ground Hub Unit
products.descriptor: Ground hub unit connecting multiple GCS peripherals and datalinks into one network segment

evidence.snippet: The GHU-100 is an essential part of any system based on a UAV Navigation flight control solution. This Ground Hub Unit is an advanced Ground Control Station hub that connects via ethernet/serial to the PC running [Visionair](/products/ground-control-station/visionair-gcs-software) and allows the connection of the joystick, as well as multiple ground peripherals and physical inputs (buttons, knobs, etc.).

products.name: VECTOR-HIL
products.descriptor: Hardware-in-the-loop simulator using real VECTOR hardware for UAV operator training and testing

evidence.snippet:
VECTOR-HIL
----------
The **VECTOR-HIL** is the most advanced training simulator developed by UAV Navigation. The HIL enables the simulation of realistic flight condition using a real VECTOR hardware & software (FCC) and a second computational unit simulating the environment and sensor input (SIM).

products.name: VECTOR-SIL
products.descriptor: Software-in-the-loop simulator for UAV Navigation autopilot operator training

evidence.snippet:
VECTOR-SIL
----------
The **VECTOR-SIL** (Software In The Loop) is a simulator which can be used to test the basic functions of UAV Navigation’s system.
